impact: Full npm test currently fails in src/lib/__tests__/mdi-intake.test.ts because the fixture subject `cognito-sub-mdi-intake` does not satisfy the app-data Cognito subject allowlist. This blocks full-suite verification even though focused T-059 webhook/app-data tests pass.
resolution: Updated the MDI intake test Cognito subject fixture to use an allowlisted opaque subject format (`cognito-sub-mdiintake`) so app-data validation accepts the test records without weakening identifier validation.
title: MDI intake tests use invalid Cognito subject fixture
